description.value:
Crusader

Crusaders are righteous warriors who stand between humanity and the horrors of the Warp, meeting daemon and heretic in personal combat with blade, shield, and unwavering faith. They are protectors as much as killers, using martial skill and spiritual fortitude to hold the line where lesser souls would break. In an Inquisitorial warband, a crusader is the wall that the unholy must crack before reaching anyone else.

Role Aptitudes

Knowledge, Offence, Strength, Toughness, Willpower

Role Talent

Bodyguard or Deny the Witch

Role Bonus

Smite the Unholy: In addition to the normal uses of Fate points, a crusader may spend a Fate point to automatically pass a Fear test with a number of degrees of success equal to his Willpower bonus. In addition, whenever he inflicts a hit with a melee attack against a target with the Fear (X) trait, he inflicts X additional damage and counts his weapon's penetration as being X higher.

specialAbilities.name: Smite the Unholy
